name: Pharisee of the Synagogue
oracleText:
Whenever an opponent casts their first spell each turn, that player loses 1 life unless they pay {1}.
Whenever you gain life, target opponent loses 1 life.
flavorText: "God, I thank thee, that I am not as other men are." — Luke 18:11
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Pharisee and the Publican" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Pharisee and the Publican
classics.sourceNotes: A textbook Pharisee composition with strong silhouette and immediate narrative clarity.
